channel.title: ITIN Lending
channel.description: ITINLending.net helps ITIN holders and foreign nationals find mortgages, auto loans, personal loans, business loans, and credit cards — no SSN required. Independent guides and lender matching.

item.title: How to Open a Bank Account With an ITIN (2026 Guide)
item.description: Yes, you can open a U.S. bank account with an ITIN. Learn which banks accept ITINs, what documents you need, and how the 2026 rules affect ITIN holders.

item.title: Can You Get a Home Equity Loan With an ITIN? (2026)
item.description: Yes — ITIN holders can access home equity loans and HELOCs without an SSN. Learn which lenders qualify you, what documents you need, and how rates compare.

item.title: How to Refinance a Mortgage With an ITIN Number (2026)
item.description: Yes, ITIN holders can refinance. Learn rate-and-term vs. cash-out options, lender requirements, LTV limits, and how to lower your monthly payment without an SSN.

item.title: How to Build Credit With an ITIN Number (2026 Guide)
item.description: Yes, you can build U.S. credit with an ITIN — no SSN required. Learn the fastest, proven steps: secured cards, credit-builder loans, and rent reporting.

item.title: How to Get a Credit Card With an ITIN Number (2026)
item.description: Yes, you can get a credit card with an ITIN—no SSN needed. Compare ITIN-friendly cards, learn which issuers accept them, and start building U.S. credit today.

item.title: How to Get a Personal Loan With an ITIN Number (2026)
item.description: Yes, you can get a personal loan with an ITIN — no SSN required. Learn which lenders accept ITIN, what rates to expect, and how to qualify in 2026.

item.title: How to Get a Business Loan With an ITIN Number (2026)
item.description: Yes, you can get a business loan with an ITIN — even after 2026 SBA rule changes. Discover which lenders still fund ITIN holders, what docs you need, and how to qualify.

item.title: How to Get a Car Loan With an ITIN Number (2026)
item.description: Yes, you can get a car loan with an ITIN — no SSN required. Learn which lenders accept ITIN, what documents you need, and how to qualify in 2026.

item.title: How to Buy a House With an ITIN Number (2026 Guide)
item.description: Yes, ITIN holders can buy a home in the U.S. Learn 2026 requirements, down payments, lender types, and a step-by-step process — no SSN needed.

item.title: Can You Get an ITIN Loan With Bad Credit?
item.description: Yes — here's how ITIN holders with bad or no credit can still get approved for a loan, which lenders are most flexible, and how to improve your odds.
